# Machine Mind

> Practical notes on software architecture, backend engineering, cloud systems,
> Rust, Java, and developer tooling — the personal technical blog and portfolio
> of Saumil Patel.

This file is an AI-readable summary of the site. It is a convenience for
generative and answer engines; it is not a formal ranking standard.

## About

- Site: Machine Mind (https://saumilp.github.io)
- Author: Saumil Patel — Software / Systems Architect
- Focus: software architecture, backend engineering, Java & Spring, Rust, AWS &
  cloud, DevOps & CI/CD, search & data, APIs, observability, developer tooling.

## Main sections

- Blog: https://saumilp.github.io/blog/ — long-form technical articles
- Notes: https://saumilp.github.io/notes/ — short technical learnings
- Projects: https://saumilp.github.io/projects/ — open-source work
- Topics: https://saumilp.github.io/categories/ — browse by topic
- About: https://saumilp.github.io/about/

## Machine-readable resources

- Sitemap: https://saumilp.github.io/sitemap.xml
- Atom feed: https://saumilp.github.io/atom.xml
- Search: in-browser via Pagefind (no server-side query API)

## Citation preference

Content may be cited with attribution to "Saumil Patel — Machine Mind" and a link
to the source page. Code samples are provided as examples; test before production
use. See https://saumilp.github.io/terms/.
